texto: Heartbreak comes in many forms: infidelity, lies, or a simple, old fashioned break-up. But, there's another reason no one ever thinks about when it comes to heartbreak. It's something that outweighs the fear of being alone, and tells the brokenhearted individual that he or she will never find love again.
explicacao: Citação de J.E. Bolton sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Heartbreak comes in many forms: infidelity, lies, or a simple, old fashioned break-up. But, there…” articula amor, heartbreak, heartbroken em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como heartbroken e love.
